title: LIFTING POINTS AND TOW TRUCK TOWING — Garage Jack and Safety Stand

figures_detected.description: Underside view of Nissan Micra K11 showing garage jack points and safety stand points, with inset diagrams illustrating attachment (S.S.T. No. LM4519-0000) fitted into the lower side sill groove of a safety stand.

content_blocks.text: LIFTING POINTS AND TOW TRUCK TOWING
Never get under the vehicle while it is supported only by the jack. Always use safety stands when you have to get under the vehicle.
Place wheel chocks at the front wheels when the rear wheels are raised and place wheel chocks at the rear wheels when the front wheels are raised.

content_blocks.description: Underside of vehicle showing designated garage jack points and safety stand points. An attachment (S.S.T. No. LM4519-0000) is used with the safety stand; fit the lower side sill into the groove of the attachment.
